summary: First-finish smoke test of Personal Life OS backend and frontend. Backend auth, members, inbox→Claude parsing (expense + vital), finance summary/transactions, FIRE, goals CRUD, dashboard overview all working. Frontend login → overview → inbox → finance → goals → health → family → logout flow all pass. Currency INR rendering correctly.
passed: GET /api/auth/me returns user with bearer token
POST /api/inbox/text 'Spent 2000 on groceries today' → Claude parses, inserts expense (confidence 0.95)
POST /api/fire with target/current/monthly/return → returns progress_pct=1.0, years_to_fire=16.9, target_date=2043-05-22
GET /api/dashboard/overview returns summary, members, fire, goals
GET /api/finance/summary returns net_worth, income_month, expense_month, category_breakdown (groceries: 2000)
Frontend /login renders, login succeeds with demo creds
Overview page shows Net Worth, FIRE card (1% of ₹5.00Cr, 16.9 yrs), family-switcher, open-inbox-button
UniversalInbox modal: typed 'Spent 2500 on groceries today', send → inbox-last-result card appeared

failed.issue: After login, navigation goes to '/' rather than '/overview' (review_request expected /overview). Overview content does render at '/' so functionally fine, but URL contract mismatch.
failed.evidence: Playwright wait_for_url('**/overview**') timed out; page URL = '/' with Overview component rendered (screenshot confirms).

failed.issue: Requires member_id in body (Pydantic 'missing' error) — review_request example payload omitted it. Not a bug per se; flagging because frontend must always send member_id.
Login returns JWT under key 'token' (not 'access_token' as test plan implied). Frontend appears to handle correctly.

action_items: Optional: redirect to /overview after login for URL consistency, or update spec to reflect '/' as canonical overview path.
Optional: document that /api/health/labs requires member_id; ensure all frontend Health forms pre-fill active member_id.
